raw.check_title: Ensure S3 bucket does not allow public access
raw.status_extended: Bucket acme-logs is publicly accessible.
raw.description: This control checks whether Amazon S3 buckets have public access blocked.
raw.risk: If this setting is enabled, any policies or access control lists (ACLs) that grant public access to this bucket and the objects that it contains are blocked.
raw.remediation_text: Enable S3 Block Public Access at the bucket level.
